fields.helpText: The record number for this extract entry.
A six character string representing the year and the month for which this extract was performed.
The corresponding entry in the DSS EXTRACT LOG file (#727) for this  extract.
Identifies the facility for this extract record.
An identifying number for the patient at the local site.
The patient's social security number.   Any patient with an SSN beginning with "00000" is considered a "test patient" and will not be included in the extract.
The first four characters of the patient's last name.
Indicates whether the patient was an inpatient or an outpatient for this extract entry.
This 8-character string represents the date on which the Dental procedure was performed.
Provider of medical care for this patient for this extract.
Exam will be S for screening or C for complete.

An entry should be made in this field when a case, a service or a  procedure has been administratively completed or terminated without an  actual patient visit (i.e., chart review, telephone call, death, etc.).
Enter the number of EXTRAORAL radiographs taken on this patient for  panoramic, cephalometric or other extraoral procedures.
Enter the number of INTRAORAL radiographs taken for this patient for PA,  bitewing, occlusal and other intraoral procedures.
In special circumstances, when a patient is of such a difficult nature that two or more appointments are needed to complete the prophylaxis, credit for each treatment episode may be recorded.
If a patient had a prophylaxis of natural dentition and a removable prosthesis cleaned on the same visit, an entry can be made for both procedures.
Patient was treated in the operating room. These cases must be credited  to a dental staff provider or a dental consultant or attending.
The number of confirmed malignant neoplasms initially recognized by a member of the Dental Service.
The number of neoplasms removed including excisional biopsies.
The number of incisional biopsies plus the number of cytological smears taken.
The number of maxillofacial fractures (surgical sites or procedures) reduced.
The appropriate patient category for this dental sitting.
The weighted value (CTV's) for the surgical procedure performed.
The number of surfaces restored with permanent restorative material.
The number of root canals permanently filled.
The number of quadrant equivalents of periodontal surgery.
The number of quadrant equivalents of subgingival curettage and/or root planing.
The weighted value of preventive dentistry instructions.
Spot check examination was performed on this patient by staff or a fee dentist.
The number of permanent crowns cemented.
The number of teeth on which a post/core or overdenture coping was cemented.
The number of abut units contained in the fixed prosthesis inserted.
The number of PONTIC UNITS contained in the fixed prosthesis inserted.
The number of R.P.D.s that were delivered to the patient.
The number of COMPLETE DENTURE units (each separate prosthesis is one unit) delivered to the patient.
The number of removable dentures and special appliances that were  repaired for this patient.
Contains the weighted values (CTV) assigned to special appliance  delivered to or disposed of for the patient.
The number of non-impacted (erupted) teeth extracted. These are simple  extractions where no surgical techniques are involved.
This includes any type of impaction or an erupted tooth where an  intentional flap is required. Also includes all post-operative care and  instructions.
Contains weighted values for procedures (CTV).
Contains the appropriate station number for this entry.
Contains a code indicating completion or termination of a case.
Contains all consults instituted via forms 513 and 10-10m.
Describes the professional evaluations not to exceed one per visit.

A pre-authorization exam is performed on a fee basis patient in order to determine treatment needs prior to authorization of the patient to a fee-for-service provider.  A second opinion exam is performed when the original estimate on a fee basis dental case exceeds $500.00.
Indicates the category of discrepancy. 1 is a minor discrepancy only.  2 is a major discrepancy, quality only. 3 is a major discrepancy,  misrepresentation only.
Current patient movement record associated with this extract record.
The name of the treating specialty associated with this extract record.
The primary care team assigned to this patient.
The primary care provider assigned to this patient.
A 6-character numeric string which represents the Dental  procedure time.
A national VA system identifier which uniquely identifies a patient.
The DSS Department Code for the Dental product.  This field is  currently not populated.
The Provider's National Provider Identifier code.
The Primary Care Provider's National Provider Identifier code.
The VA Code of the Person Class of the Primary Care Provider  associated with this record.

This is a reference to the NEW PERSON file (#200) for the provider who is the patients Associate Provider for Primary Care as assigned with the PCMM application.  The IEN to file #200 is prefixed with the  character 2.

The field will hold the VA Code associated with the active Person Class of the Associate Primary Care Provider as assigned by through the PCMM appilcation.  The VA Code is always of the form "V"_six numeric digits;   exactly 7 characters in length.
The Associate Primary Care PRovider's National Provider Identifier.

DOM, PRRTP and SAARTP Indicator indicates if the patient is admitted to either a DOM, PRRTP or SAARTP at the time hospital service is provided. Domiciliary (DOM) Psychiatric Residential Rehabilitation Treatment Program (PRRTP) Substance Abuse Residential Rehabiltation Treatment Program (SARRTP)
This field is derived from the inpatient/outpatient status, treating specialty, and DSS Identifier or feeder key values in the record.
This field is derived from the inpatient/outpatient status, SSN, admit/visit date, treating specialty, observation patient indicator, and DSS Identifier or feeder key values in the record.
Data represents the medical center division the work was performed in. This field corresponds to an entry in the INSTITUTION file (#4).
